name: Hyliion Holdings Corp.
summary: Part I Overview Hyliion Holdings Corp. is a Delaware corporation headquartered in Cedar Park, Texas, with research and development (R&D) facilities in Cincinnati, Ohio, that designs and develops power generators for stationary and mobile applications and provides R&D services. References to the Company, Hyliion, we, or us in this report refer to Hyliion Holdings Corp. and its wholly owned subsidiary, unless expressly indicated or the context otherwise requires.
